message.content:
[Opening shot: Quick cuts of frustrated Gen Z teens scrolling TikTok, memes of boomers ignoring climate protests, overlaid with dramatic music like a sped-up Billie Eilish track]

**Voiceover (energetic, hype Gen Z vibe):** "Yo, high school seniors! You're 17, slaying life, but boomers won't let you vote? They're ignoring our vibes on climate, guns, TikTok bans—deciding YOUR future while you're ghosted. 😤 #AdultingFail"

[Cut to text on screen: "17 y/o pay taxes, fight wars? But NO VOTE? 💀"]

**You (on camera, pointing at viewer):** "We've got the energy, the takes, the memes. Lower the voting age to 16! Flood the polls, drown out the olds. Our world, our rules. Who's with me? 🔥"

[End with duet call-to-action: "Duet this if you're voting age NOW! Petition link in bio 👇 #LowerVotingAge #GenZFightsBack #IgnoreTheBoomers"]

[Sound: Viral drop + "Periodt!" sting]
